arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag lined up for first job since Man Utd exit as Jurgen Klopp role emerges
arts.sum: Red Bull Leipzig have created a shortlist of possible replacements for manager Marco Rose amid the club's torrid run of form and former Manchester United boss Erik Ten Hag has been included

arts.ttl: Man United defender Luke Shaw says he is 'absolutely devastated' after injury setback
arts.sum: I’m absolutely devastated and it’s extremely tough to come to terms with reality at this moment in time.” In a post Tuesday to his five million followers on Instagram, Shaw wrote: “It’s hurting a lot having to write this as I really thought I had got through my recent struggles and was on a positive path going forward, but unfortunately I’ve had a small setback.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim names surprise star as “the future” of Man United
arts.sum: New Man United coach Ruben Amorim has named summer signing Noussair Mazraoui as “the future” Manchester club, which may come as a surprise to fans of the Premier League giants. United are blessed with several young stars and if asked who the future of their club should be built around, fans would likely bring up […] The post Ruben Amorim names surprise star as “the future” of Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka latest: Arteta responds to Cristiano Ronaldo comparison
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has admitted that Bukayo Saka ’s impact at Arsenal this season has been “incredible,” while he has given his verdict on comparisons with Cristiano Ronaldo . In addition to his verdict on whether Saka should aim to mimic Ronaldo, Arteta was also keen to stress the England star’s development this season.

arts.ttl: Manchester United should already know their first departure of the January transfer window
arts.sum: Man United's U21s won 1-0 against Rochdale on Tuesday night and midfielder Dan Gore wore the captain's armband.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Man United: Ruben Amorim can exploit one Gunners weakness in Premier League clash
arts.sum: Riccardo Calafiori could be Arsenal's biggest weakness in their Premier League clash with Manchester United on Wednesday, Gunners expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: 'Absolutely devastated' - Man United receive fresh Luke Shaw injury blow as return timescale emerges
arts.sum: Man Utd take on Arsenal in the Premier League on Wednesday but Luke Shaw will not be available through injury.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta responds when asked whether Man United could actually challenge for the title this season

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Arsenal and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Premier League title favourites: Pep Guardiola, Manchester City knocked out of race, Arsenal, Mikel Arteta hanging on
arts.sum: Liverpool have eliminated Manchester City from the title race and are so far ahead of Arsenal that only an injury crisis could prevent the Reds from winning the league.
